Calculations:

2. Starship R&D / Space Segment Adjusted EBITDA = 460.03%

Let me also note that the Space segment operating loss was $(657) million, and the Segment Adjusted EBITDA was $653 million (after adding back D&A of $757M, SBC of $515M, and impairment of $38M).
